summary_en: 80M shares (11.2% of outstanding), ¥150.0B limit, open-market acquisition from May 18, 2026 to Mar 16, 2027. All acquired shares to be cancelled on Mar 23, 2027.
title_en: Notice of Decision on Acquisition of Treasury Shares and Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: On May 15, 2026, Subaru Corporation's board of directors resolved to acquire and cancel its own shares pursuant to the Companies Act. The company will acquire up to 80 million ordinary shares (11.2% of shares outstanding) for a maximum total of ¥150.0 billion via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between May 18, 2026 and March 16, 2027. All shares acquired will be cancelled on March 23, 2027. The acquisition and cancellation are undertaken in accordance with the company's shareholder return policy.
